title: Were Neanderthals Culturally Modern Humans? - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews David Reich on whether Neanderthals possessed cultural modernity. The discussion explores archaeological and genetic evidence regarding Neanderthal cognition and behavior relative to modern humans.
